user.title: Connect to Hoymiles DTU
user.description: Enter the address of your Hoymiles DTU (Modbus TCP). Optionally re-publish all received data to an external MQTT broker.

data.mqtt_enabled: Re-publish data to an external MQTT broker

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the DTU.
data_description.microinverter_type: MI or HM series. All microinverters must be the same type.
data_description.unit_id: Modbus unit/device ID of the DTU (usually 1).
data_description.mqtt_topic: Base topic that all published state messages are nested under.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Hoymiles DTU
reconfigure.description: Update the connection and MQTT settings. The DTU serial must stay the same.

data.mqtt_enabled: Re-publish data to an external MQTT broker

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the DTU.
data_description.microinverter_type: MI or HM series. All microinverters must be the same type.
data_description.unit_id: Modbus unit/device ID of the DTU (usually 1).
data_description.mqtt_topic: Base topic that all published state messages are nested under.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the DTU. Check the host, port and that the DTU is reachable.
error.mqtt_host_required: An MQTT broker host is required when MQTT re-publishing is enabled.

abort.wrong_dtu: That connection points at a different DTU than the one configured here.
